languages.text: Нечестивцам, что предпочли смерти роль забавы для богомерзких ксеносов, дан еще один шанс. Закаленные и жестокие бойцы пополнили абордажные команды, что встревожило многих набожных членов экипажа.

traits.locale_text: Нечестивцам, что предпочли смерти роль забавы для богомерзких ксеносов, дан еще один шанс. Закаленные и жестокие бойцы пополнили абордажные команды, что встревожило многих набожных членов экипажа.
Нечестивцам, что предпочли смерти роль забавы для богомерзких ксеносов, дан еще один шанс. Закаленные и жестокие бойцы пополнили абордажные команды, что встревожило многих набожных членов экипажа.

languages.text: The heretics, who chose to become the plaything of ungodly xenos over a righteous death, have been given another chance. The ranks of the ship's landing crews have swelled with hardened and brutal fighters, alarming many of the vessel's pious inhabitants.
languages.original_text: Нечестивцам, что предпочли смерти роль забавы для богомерзких ксеносов, дан еще один шанс. Закаленные и жестокие бойцы пополнили абордажные команды, что встревожило многих набожных членов экипажа.

traits.locale_text: The heretics, who chose the fate of the plaything of the ungodly xenos over righteous death, are given another chance. Hardened and brutal fighters filled the boarding crews, which alarmed many of the pious inhabitants of the voidship.

The heretics, who chose the fate of the plaything of the ungodly xenos over righteous death, are given another chance. Hardened and brutal fighters filled the boarding crews, which alarmed many of the pious inhabitants of the voidship.

The heretics, who chose to become the plaything of ungodly xenos over a righteous death, have been given another chance. The ranks of the ship's landing crews have swelled with hardened and brutal fighters, alarming many of the vessel's pious inhabitants.

The heretics, who chose to become the plaything of ungodly xenos over a righteous death, have been given another chance. The ranks of the ship's landing crews have swelled with hardened and brutal fighters, alarming many of the vessel's pious inhabitants.

languages.text: Die Ketzer, die lieber zum Spielball gottloser Xenos wurden als einen gerechten Tod zu sterben, haben eine weitere Chance erhalten. Die Reihen der Landungstrupps des Schiffes haben sich mit hartgesottenen und brutalen Kämpfern gefüllt, was viele der frommen Bewohner des Schiffes alarmiert.
languages.original_text: The heretics, who chose to become the plaything of ungodly xenos over a righteous death, have been given another chance. The ranks of the ship's landing crews have swelled with hardened and brutal fighters, alarming many of the vessel's pious inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: Die Ketzer, die lieber zum Spielball gottloser Xenos wurden als einen gerechten Tod zu sterben, haben eine weitere Chance erhalten. Die Reihen der Landungstrupps des Schiffes haben sich mit hartgesottenen und brutalen Kämpfern gefüllt, was viele der frommen Bewohner des Schiffes alarmiert.

languages.text: Les hérétiques, qui ont préféré devenir le jouet de xénos impies plutôt que de mourir en toute justice, se sont vus offrir une nouvelle chance. Les rangs des équipes de débarquement du vaisseau se sont étoffés de combattants endurcis et brutaux, ce qui a inquiété bon nombre des habitants pieux du vaisseau.
languages.original_text: The heretics, who chose to become the plaything of ungodly xenos over a righteous death, have been given another chance. The ranks of the ship's landing crews have swelled with hardened and brutal fighters, alarming many of the vessel's pious inhabitants.

traits.locale_text: Les hérétiques, qui ont préféré devenir le jouet de xénos impies plutôt que de mourir en toute justice, se sont vus offrir une nouvelle chance. Les rangs des équipes de débarquement du vaisseau se sont étoffés de combattants endurcis et brutaux, ce qui a inquiété bon nombre des habitants pieux du vaisseau.

languages.text: A los herejes, que eligieron convertirse en el juguete de xenos impíos en lugar de una muerte justa, se les ha dado otra oportunidad. Las filas de las tripulaciones de desembarco de la nave se han engrosado con luchadores endurecidos y brutales, alarmando a muchos de los piadosos habitantes de la nave.
languages.original_text: The heretics, who chose to become the plaything of ungodly xenos over a righteous death, have been given another chance. The ranks of the ship's landing crews have swelled with hardened and brutal fighters, alarming many of the vessel's pious inhabitants.

Las filas de las tripulaciones de desembarco de la nave se han engrosado con luchadores endurecidos y brutales, alarmando a muchos de los piadosos habitantes de la nave.

languages.text: Dürüst bir ölüm yerine dinsiz xenos'ların oyuncağı olmayı seçen kafirlere bir şans daha verildi. Geminin çıkarma mürettebatının safları, geminin dindar sakinlerinin çoğunu endişelendiren sert ve acımasız savaşçılarla doldu.
languages.original_text: The heretics, who chose to become the plaything of ungodly xenos over a righteous death, have been given another chance. The ranks of the ship's landing crews have swelled with hardened and brutal fighters, alarming many of the vessel's pious inhabitants.
